code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    let b0 = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b0 == 32 or b0 == 9 or b0 == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b0 == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b0 == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut parsing = true
      while parsing
        if i >= n
          parsing = false
        else
          let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
          when Some(x)
            x
          when None
            -1
          end
          if b >= 48 and b <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            parsing = false
          end
        end
      end
      let result = val * 2 * sign
      if first
        out = "#{result}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{result}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
